summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bestpl.ai platform. Backend API testing shows 93.8% success rate (15/16 tests passed). Critical frontend authentication issue discovered - users can register but cannot access any protected routes including dashboard, AI tools, challenges, etc. This blocks 15 out of 16 required features.

minor_bugs.issue: Login fails with provided test credentials 'testphase4@bestpl.ai / TestPass123'
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot login with existing test user, but registration and new user login works

critical_bugs.issue: Session cookies not persisting after registration - users redirected to landing page when accessing protected routes
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks access to dashboard, AI tools, challenges, profile, leaderboard - makes app unusable

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard shows blank loading screen instead of content when authentication fails

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, feature cards, and auth panel
Auth panel shows/hides correctly with Get Started button
Brand logo and navigation elements present
Backend dashboard stats, leaderboard, challenges APIs work
Backend AI tools generate content correctly using GPT-5.2
Backend challenge creation, upvoting, and answers work
Backend authentication system works via direct API calls

success_percentage.frontend: 20% (4/16 features work - only landing page and registration UI)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication session management. Users can register but session cookies are not being set/persisted, causing all protected routes to redirect to landing page. This blocks 15/16 features. Check: 1) Cookie settings in FastAPI CORS configuration, 2) Session cookie httpOnly/secure/samesite settings, 3) Frontend axios withCredentials configuration, 4) ProtectedRoute component authentication checking logic.
